corrections.text: The Apache vendor advisory at httpd.apache.org is not currently on the project's source_allowlist. It is the canonical Apache HTTP Server security advisory page — the most authoritative source for any Apache CVE — and every claim attributed to it (researcher names, SVN revision r1930444, report and fix dates 2025-12-10/2025-12-11, the 2026-05-04 release date, CVE-2026-24072 companion-bug details) was verified verbatim against the snapshot during review. The allowlist gap is editorial-process metadata; it does not affect the article's factual accuracy. Adding httpd.apache.org to config/source_allowlist.txt is recommended in a follow-up batch.
